tldr: The municipality of Gävle has decided to allocate 1,000,000 Swedish krona to the "Gävle Model" project, which aims to improve efforts to assist individuals who are far from the labor market.
lattlast:
The municipal council in Gävle has decided to invest one million Swedish krona in a project called the "Gävle Model." The purpose of the project is to find new and better ways to help people who have difficulty finding employment, such as those who have been unemployed for a long time.

The funds will be used to develop methods that make it easier for people who are far from the labor market to enter the workforce. Through this work, the aim is to reduce social exclusion in the municipality and create more job opportunities for those who need them most.

This decision means that the municipality is investing in improving support for job seekers by testing new approaches. The goal is to create a more sustainable path to employment for those who have difficulty establishing themselves in the labor market.
